items.title: Jim Cramer Dissects Kimberly-Clark’s Acquisition of Kenvue
items.description: Kimberly-Clark Corporation (NASDAQ:KMB) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer recently offered insights on. Cramer discussed the company’s planned acquisition of Kenvue during the episode. He said: “Alright, this is one we’ve talked about a bunch, Kimberly-Clark’s bold, nearly $49 billion bid to buy Kenvue, which is the J&J’s old over-the-counter business that makes Tylenol, […]
